per_entity_results.generated: MoonGen Setup Scripts for L2 Performance Testing
per_entity_results.reference: MoonGen Load Latency Benchmarks

per_entity_results.generated: This experiment involved setting up two nodes (cesis and nida) with environment scripts and resetting them to a clean state using specified live images. The methodology included preparing the test environment by installing dependencies, cloning repositories, building software, configuring system parameters like hugetlbfs and disabling turbo boost for stable performance. Subsequently, network traffic was generated via MoonGen scripts, which captured timing metrics during L2 forwarding tests. Evaluation focused on measuring packet latency under varying rates and sizes while automatically recording energy consumption to assess efficiency.
per_entity_results.reference: This experiment measures l2-load-latency in a two-node setup with MoonGen on one node as the load generator and libmoon on another node as the forwarding device under test. The benchmark tests different packet rates and packet sizes. Each measurement runs for fixed duration, records energy consumption on both machines, and stores latency histograms as CSV data and PNG plots for every parameter combination.

per_entity_results.generated: This artifact is a comma-separated values file containing latency measurements collected during an L2 load test. It was generated to provide data points for plotting histogram distributions using `plot_latency.py`.
per_entity_results.reference: Uploaded latency histogram CSV for one benchmark iteration containing the latency-distribution data produced for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

per_entity_results.generated: It is a histogram plot showing latency measurements from the packet rate and size experiment, with IQR filtering applied to remove outliers.
per_entity_results.reference: Uploaded latency histogram plot for one benchmark iteration of the MoonGen L2 load-latency experiment. It visualizes the filtered latency distribution for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

per_entity_results.generated: This script prepares the test environment by installing dependencies and setting up the Device Under Test (DUT). It clones a specified repository into `libmoon`, checks out a designated commit, builds it, configures hugetlbfs, and disables turbo boost to ensure stable performance. The setup is complete for subsequent execution of tests or measurements.
per_entity_results.reference: Prepares the DUT node by building libmoon and enabling hugepage support. It also disables CPU turbo boost for more stable forwarding measurements.

per_entity_results.generated: This script sets up a system component for generating network loads or traffic patterns. It synchronizes required software dependencies during installation. Measurement capture involves extracting timing data and other metrics related to the build process.
per_entity_results.reference: Prepares the load-generator node by building MoonGen from the provided repository and branch. Additionally, it enables hugepage support for packet generation and latency measurements.

per_entity_results.generated: File copy from /home/warmuth/experiments/experiments/loop-experiment-llm/evaluation/plot_latency.py to MoonGen/plot_latency.py on node cesis.
per_entity_results.reference: File copy from /home/warmuth/experiments/experiments/loop-experiment-llm/evaluation/plot_latency.py to MoonGen/plot_latency.py on node cesis.

per_entity_results.generated: This command runs MoonGen with a Lua script to measure Layer 2 load-induced data packet latency.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example using the selected transmit and receive ports and histogram output paths.

per_entity_results.generated: This script serves as a network traffic generator designed to capture timing metrics during L2 performance testing. It orchestrates workload generation for latency measurement analysis.
per_entity_results.reference: Looped benchmark that iterates over all configured packet-rate and packet-size combinations, synchronizes with the DUT, records node energy usage and runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example. Afterwards it uploads the generated latency histogram and plot.

per_entity_results.generated: Each iteration executes a benchmark measuring network latency under varying packet rates and sizes. The primary evaluation involves generating and transmitting packets to assess system performance metrics. Recorded outputs include histogram data for latency analysis across different configurations.
per_entity_results.reference: Each iteration runs the MoonGen l2-load-latency script with different values for packet rate and packet size, storing the measured latencies in a CSV file, generating a plot, and uploading both artifacts after each run.

per_entity_results.generated: Run an L2 forwarding test with two specified parameters, measuring latency.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs libmoon's l2-forward example so the DUT forwards traffic during the load-generator measurement window.

per_entity_results.generated: This script measures L2 load latency in network forwarding by executing a Lua test case on the target device under test (DuT). It coordinates data transfer and measurement using synchronization commands. Energy consumption during the test loop is monitored and recorded automatically.
per_entity_results.reference: Forwarder that synchronizes with the load-generator node, records energy usage and forwards the received packets back to the load-generator node.

per_entity_results.generated: This script executes a benchmark with varying packet rate and size parameters to measure latency or performance. Each iteration evaluates network behavior under these conditions.
per_entity_results.reference: Each iteration runs the libmoon l2-forward script to forward the received packets from the loadgen node.
